name: Beer Garden
description: Open-air drinking with long dwell times and a crowd in a relaxed, spending mood.

name: Brewery & Taproom
description: Taprooms full of regulars with time on their hands and a little money to spend.

name: Barcade
description: Arcade bars where adults linger between games — prime dwell time for an impulse pull.

name: Bar & Pub
description: Neighborhood spots where a card machine becomes a conversation piece and a draw.

name: Pool Hall
description: Long sessions, repeat visits, and a crowd that loves a little side action.

name: Game & Hobby Shop
description: Collectors already in the building — sealed packs by the register sell themselves.
